positive: A mystical celestial geometry pattern featuring stylized constellations, interlocking planetary rings, and ethereal nebula dust, rendered in high contrast monochrome with pops of iridescent teal and gold leaf accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating seamless pattern or a single-print chest graphic. Focus on clean, sharp vector lines and detailed filigree work that resembles engraved art. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with celestial cartography. Lighting: Dramatic, focused spotlighting highlighting the intricate details. Palette: Deep midnight blue, brilliant white, teal, and metallic gold accents. Minimalist yet richly detailed. High resolution, print-ready, symmetrical.
